case_title: COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC. VS. RAMIN TABARSI et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER COLUMBIA CREDIT SERVICES, INC. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT TABARSI, RAMIN $8,357.88 PRINCIPAL, $520.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,527.77 INTEREST, $192.60 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,598.25, , TOGETHER WITH INTEREST ON SUCH JUDGMENT AS PROVIDE BY LAW (SEE SCANNED DOC)
